status.notes: Character dropped to NPC Status 11/17/02

notes:
*Expert Vicissitude, Draconian Maurauder:  By spending 1 Blood Trait, Gorynich may assume the form of her namesake--a dragon.  She gains the following Physical Traits:  Brutal, Ferocious x2, Lithe, Quick x2, and Tough x3.  In this wyvern-like form, she may fly 15 feet per action, though she must concentrate only on flight.  She may carry one person or up to 500 pounds.  All Brawl attacks made in this form cause aggravated damage.



*Advanced Ritual, Ball of Abysmal Flame:  This Ritual requires the caster have Advanced Lure of Flames before attempting to learn or use it.  The material component of the ritual is a brass ring, which must be worn on the middle finger of the caster's right hand; only the person who casts this ritual may invoke it.  The ritual must be cast on the brass ring, which may only hold one casting at a given time.  By expending one Willpower Trait and engaging a target in a Mental Challenge versus their Physical Traits, the caster may hurl a blast of flame at a target that causes three aggravated wounds from fire damage; the victim must make a Simple Test to extinguish the flame.  If unsuccessful, the victim takes one additional aggravated wound per turn that the flame continues to burn.

status.notes:

She gains the following Physical Traits:  Brutal, Ferocious x2, Lithe, Quick x2, and Tough x3.  In this wyvern-like form, she may fly 15 feet per action, though she must concentrate only on flight.  She may carry one person or up to 500 pounds.  All Brawl attacks made in this form cause aggravated damage.



*Advanced Ritual, Ball of Abysmal Flame:  This Ritual requires the caster have Advanced Lure of Flames before attempting to learn or use it.  The material component of the ritual is a brass ring, which must be worn on the middle finger of the caster's right hand; only the person who casts this ritual may invoke it.  The ritual must be cast on the brass ring, which may only hold one casting at a given time.  By expending one Willpower Trait and engaging a target in a Mental Challenge versus their Physical Traits, the caster may hurl a blast of flame at a target that causes three aggravated wounds from fire damage; the victim must make a Simple Test to extinguish the flame.  If unsuccessful, the victim takes one additional aggravated wound per turn that the flame continues to burn.
